name: augment-of-mind
description: Fifteen Faculties, one coherent adaptive mind for consequential work.

interface.shortDescription: Fifteen Faculties, one coherent adaptive mind.
interface.longDescription: Compose only the cognitive Faculties a consequential task needs, then return one accountable result.
defaultPrompt: Use $augment-of-mind to compose the smallest useful Faculty coalition for this mission.
Use $sensemaking to turn this tangled situation into a working map.
Use $decision-intelligence to compare these choices and recommend one.
